preferred: No data found. Add a contact to get started.
Your campaign is live. Track conversions in Analytics.
avoid: We are delighted to offer you a best-in-class experience.
Leverage this cutting-edge funnel builder to synergize your pipeline.

ui_copy_rules.labels: Nouns or noun phrases. No filler. 'Reply-to Email', not 'Please enter your reply-to email address'.
ui_copy_rules.errors: State the problem. Suggest the fix. 'Invalid email. Use format: user@domain.com'.
ui_copy_rules.empty_states: State what is empty. Offer the next action. 'No campaigns. Create one to get started.'
ui_copy_rules.confirmations: Confirm the action, not the system state. 'Campaign saved.' not 'Your campaign has been successfully saved to the system.'
